Factors including tires, drive modes, HVAC settings and accessories can all have an impact on range." data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv:var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;transform:none"><p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1jb7mm" data-styles-preset="cIhlivV73" dir="auto" style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155)))">Rox is committed to the privacy and security of its users. Customer data processed through the Rox platform is encrypted in transit and at rest using AES-256 encryption and is never used to train generalized machine learning models. Rox maintains SOC 2 Type II compliance and undergoes independent third-party security audits on an annual basis. All AI-generated outputs, including but not limited to prospect recommendations, message drafts, meeting summaries, and pipeline scoring, are provided for informational purposes and should be reviewed by authorized personnel before any action is taken. Performance metrics referenced on this website, including pipeline generation figures, response rates, and revenue impact, reflect results reported by individual customers under specific configurations and may not be representative of all deployments. Actual results will vary based on factors including but not limited to data quality, CRM configuration, outreach volume, market conditions, and target audience. Rox does not guarantee specific revenue outcomes. The Rox platform integrates with third-party services including Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, Slack, and others; availability and functionality of third-party integrations are subject to the respective providers' terms of service and may change without notice. Features described as "autopilot," "autonomous," or "automated" operate within user-defined parameters and require initial configuration and ongoing oversight. Rox, the Rox logo, and "Revenue on Autopilot" are trademarks of Rox Data Corp. All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners. Service availability is subject to the terms outlined in your enterprise agreement. We do not train data on user queries. This offer may not be combined with other public offers unless permitted by Rivian. Offer subject to change or termination at any time. + All example lease offers below require very well qualified lessees to order and obtain an approved lease offer on or before March 20, 2026, and take delivery by March 31, 2026. Example offers below require 36-month lease terms with 30,000 t miles. Example offer: New 2026 R1T Dual Motor with Large Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $84,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,049, with $5,944 DUE AT SIGNING aft Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Example offer: New 2026 R1S Dual Motor with Large Battery Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $88,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,059, with $5,954 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Sil paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Example offer: New 2026 R1T Dual Motor with Max Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $91,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,249, with $6,144 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Exam offer: New 2026 R1S Dual Motor with Max Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $95,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,269, with $6,164 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribu and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Amount due at signing includes a $4,000 capitalized cost reduction (including S deposit), first mo. payment, $895 acquisition fee, and $0 security deposit. Amounts due at signing shown in the example offers above are amounts due after application of the $3,000 Rivian contribution through the $3,000 lease contribution offer. Add'l fees due at signing include tax, title, license, registration, and lessor documentation fees. Lessee may not qualify for security depc waiver. End of lease charges include: excess vehicle wear, 30 cents/mile for excess mileage, and $495 disposition fee. Offer only available in: AK*, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, I LA, MA, MD, MI, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OR, PA, RI, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WV. Limited availability. All offers are subject to credit approval, vehicle availability, priority delivery, and subject to change or termination at any time. *Vehicle delivery in AK is not yet available. 3. Prices shown do not include all applicable taxes and fees. R1S as shown priced at $109,900. R1T as shown priced at $107,350. Vehicle prices shown do not include all applicable taxes and fees. Le offers require very well qualified lessees to order and obtain an approved leasing offer on or before 3/31/2026. Example offers below require 36-month lease terms with 30,000 total miles and th following dealer options: 20&quot; All Seasons wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee.Example offer: Lease a new 2026 R1S Dual Standard with a vehicle price o $76,990, a monthly lease payment of $899, with $8,794 DUE AT SIGNING.Example offer: Lease a new 2026 R1T Dual Standard with a vehicle price of $72,990, a monthly lease payment of $899, wit $8,794 DUE AT SIGNING. Amount due at signing includes $7,000 capitalized cost reduction (incl. $500 deposit), first mo. payment, $895 acquisition fee, and $0 security deposit. Add'l fees due at signing include tax, title, license, registration, and lessor documentation fees. Lessee may not qualify for security deposit waiver. End of lease charges include: excess vehicle wear, 30 cents/mile excess mileage, and $495 disposition fee. Offer only available in: AK*, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, IL, LA, MA, MD, MI, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OR, PA, RI, S TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WV. All offers are subject to credit approval, vehicle availability, priority for delivery, and subject to change or termination at any time. *Vehicle deliver AK is not yet available. 4. Official EPA range values are noted. Other range estimates are preliminary estimates based on the EPA test cycle and are not official EPA values. The EPA estimates range through a series of standardized lab tests that mimic real world conditions. Factors including tires, drive modes, HVAC settings and accessories can all have an impact on range." data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv:var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;transform:none"><p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1jb7mm" data-styles-preset="cIhlivV73" dir="auto" style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155)))">Rox is committed to the privacy and security of its users. Customer data processed through the Rox platform is encrypted in transit and at rest using AES-256 encryption and is never used to train generalized machine learning models. Rox maintains SOC 2 Type II compliance and undergoes independent third-party security audits on an annual basis. All AI-generated outputs, including but not limited to prospect recommendations, message drafts, meeting summaries, and pipeline scoring, are provided for informational purposes and should be reviewed by authorized personnel before any action is taken. Performance metrics referenced on this website, including pipeline generation figures, response rates, and revenue impact, reflect results reported by individual customers under specific configurations and may not be representative of all deployments. Actual results will vary based on factors including but not limited to data quality, CRM configuration, outreach volume, market conditions, and target audience. Rox does not guarantee specific revenue outcomes. The Rox platform integrates with third-party services including Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, Slack, and others; availability and functionality of third-party integrations are subject to the respective providers' terms of service and may change without notice. Features described as "autopilot," "autonomous," or "automated" operate within user-defined parameters and require initial configuration and ongoing oversight. Rox, the Rox logo, and "Revenue on Autopilot" are trademarks of Rox Data Corp. All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners. Service availability is subject to the terms outlined in your enterprise agreement. For questions regarding data processing, compliance certifications, or platform capabilities, contact <!--$--><a class="framer-text" href="mailto:security@rox.com" rel="noopener">security@rox.com</a><!--/$-->.</p></div><div class="framer-yx8vmt" data-framer-name="Footer"><div class="framer-orb8ua" data-framer-name="Phone"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" We do not train data on user queries. This offer may not be combined with other public offers unless permitted by Rivian. Offer subject to change or termination at any time. + All example lease offers below require very well qualified lessees to order and obtain an approved lease offer on or before March 20, 2026, and take delivery by March 31, 2026. Example offers below require 36-month lease terms with 30,000 t miles. Example offer: New 2026 R1T Dual Motor with Large Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $84,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,049, with $5,944 DUE AT SIGNING aft Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Example offer: New 2026 R1S Dual Motor with Large Battery Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $88,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,059, with $5,954 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Sil paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Example offer: New 2026 R1T Dual Motor with Max Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $91,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,249, with $6,144 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribution, and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Exam offer: New 2026 R1S Dual Motor with Max Battery and Performance Upgrade with a vehicle price of $95,990 a monthly lease payment of $1,269, with $6,164 DUE AT SIGNING after Rivian contribu and with the following options: 22&quot; wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee. Amount due at signing includes a $4,000 capitalized cost reduction (including S deposit), first mo. payment, $895 acquisition fee, and $0 security deposit. Amounts due at signing shown in the example offers above are amounts due after application of the $3,000 Rivian contribution through the $3,000 lease contribution offer. Add'l fees due at signing include tax, title, license, registration, and lessor documentation fees. Lessee may not qualify for security depc waiver. End of lease charges include: excess vehicle wear, 30 cents/mile for excess mileage, and $495 disposition fee. Offer only available in: AK*, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, I LA, MA, MD, MI, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OR, PA, RI, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WV. Limited availability. All offers are subject to credit approval, vehicle availability, priority delivery, and subject to change or termination at any time. *Vehicle delivery in AK is not yet available. 3. Prices shown do not include all applicable taxes and fees. R1S as shown priced at $109,900. R1T as shown priced at $107,350. Vehicle prices shown do not include all applicable taxes and fees. Le offers require very well qualified lessees to order and obtain an approved leasing offer on or before 3/31/2026. Example offers below require 36-month lease terms with 30,000 total miles and th following dealer options: 20&quot; All Seasons wheels, LA Silver paint, Black Mountain interior, plus an $1,895 destination fee.Example offer: Lease a new 2026 R1S Dual Standard with a vehicle price o $76,990, a monthly lease payment of $899, with $8,794 DUE AT SIGNING.Example offer: Lease a new 2026 R1T Dual Standard with a vehicle price of $72,990, a monthly lease payment of $899, wit $8,794 DUE AT SIGNING. Amount due at signing includes $7,000 capitalized cost reduction (incl. $500 deposit), first mo. payment, $895 acquisition fee, and $0 security deposit. Add'l fees due at signing include tax, title, license, registration, and lessor documentation fees. Lessee may not qualify for security deposit waiver. End of lease charges include: excess vehicle wear, 30 cents/mile excess mileage, and $495 disposition fee. Offer only available in: AK*, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, IL, LA, MA, MD, MI, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OR, PA, RI, S TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WV. Limited availability. All offers are subject to credit approval, vehicle availability, priority for delivery, and subject to change or termination at any time. *Vehicle deliver AK is not yet available. 4. Official EPA range values are noted. Other range estimates are preliminary estimates based on the EPA test cycle and are not official EPA values. The EPA estimates range through a series of standardized lab tests that mimic real world conditions. Factors including tires, drive modes, HVAC settings and accessories can all have an impact on range." data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv:var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;transform:none"><p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1jb7mm" data-styles-preset="cIhlivV73" dir="auto" style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-71dc2f90-4dea-4665-984c-a7e75175f98a, rgb(166, 160, 155)))">Rox is committed to the privacy and security of its users. Customer data processed through the Rox platform is encrypted in transit and at rest using AES-256 encryption and is never used to train generalized machine learning models. Rox maintains SOC 2 Type II compliance and undergoes independent third-party security audits on an annual basis. All AI-generated outputs, including but not limited to prospect recommendations, message drafts, meeting summaries, and pipeline scoring, are provided for informational purposes and should be reviewed by authorized personnel before any action is taken. Performance metrics referenced on this website, including pipeline generation figures, response rates, and revenue impact, reflect results reported by individual customers under specific configurations and may not be representative of all deployments. Actual results will vary based on factors including but not limited to data quality, CRM configuration, outreach volume, market conditions, and target audience. Rox does not guarantee specific revenue outcomes. The Rox platform integrates with third-party services including Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, Slack, and others; availability and functionality of third-party integrations are subject to the respective providers' terms of service and may change without notice. Features described as "autopilot," "autonomous," or "automated" operate within user-defined parameters and require initial configuration and ongoing oversight. Rox, the Rox logo, and "Revenue on Autopilot" are trademarks of Rox Data Corp. All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners. Service availability is subject to the terms outlined in your enterprise agreement. For questions regarding data processing, compliance certifications, or platform capabilities, contact <!--$--><a class="framer-text" href="mailto:security@rox.com" rel="noopener">security@rox.com</a><!--/$-->.</p></div><div class="framer-yx8vmt" data-framer-name="Footer"><div class="framer-orb8ua" data-framer-name="Phone"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" Every sequence is tailored to the account, not copy-pasted from a template.\"]]]",{"type":9,"value":300},"Generates pipeline on autopilot",{"type":9,"value":302},"Personalizes outreach across channels",{"type":9,"value":304},"Reduces repetitive outbound work",{"type":9,"value":306},"Keeps sequences moving consistently",{"type":9,"value":308},"z83bTEO1v",{"f3SYvBJLQ":310,"gq3yWTCpl":311,"qQ9qGex2E":313,"gHxesv1i2":315,"KJ6_kkpoJ":317,"HmKwdN7Pu":319,"qF82LzZ76":322,"ziDVbQeO3":324,"kTzoPKY1_":326,"OVbryiK6t":328,"id":330},{"type":237,"value":264},{"type":9,"value":312},"Conversation Intelligence",{"type":237,"value":314},"owQBIY2cb",{"type":9,"value":316},"conversation-intelligence",{"type":9,"value":318},"Meeting prep, insights, and follow-ups, so your agent knows what happened and what to do next.",{"type":248,"value":320},{"collectionId":250,"pointer":321},"[1,[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Every call is summarized, commitments are tracked, and follow-ups are drafted before the meeting ends. Rox turns conversations into context so nothing gets lost between calls and your agent always walks in prepared.\"]]]",{"type":9,"value":323},"Prepares reps before meetings",{"type":9,"value":325},"Captures insights from calls",{"type":9,"value":327},"Turns conversations into follow-ups",{"type":9,"value":329},"Improves post-meeting handoffs",{"type":9,"value":331},"KrqejO11V",{"f3SYvBJLQ":333,"gq3yWTCpl":334,"qQ9qGex2E":336,"gHxesv1i2":338,"KJ6_kkpoJ":340,"HmKwdN7Pu":342,"qF82LzZ76":345,"ziDVbQeO3":347,"kTzoPKY1_":349,"OVbryiK6t":351,"id":353},{"type":237,"value":264},{"type":9,"value":335},"Revenue Intelligence",{"type":237,"value":337},"Z0rt3XMRl",{"type":9,"value":339},"revenue-intelligence",{"type":9,"value":341},"Pipeline visibility, deal risk alerts, and automatic CRM write-back, so nothing falls through the cracks.",{"type":248,"value":343},{"collectionId":250,"pointer":344},"[1,[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Rox tracks every deal, flags what's slipping, and writes back to your CRM automatically. Your forecast reflects reality and not just what reps remember to log. Deal risk surfaces before it becomes a loss.\"]]]",{"type":9,"value":346},"Spots deal risks earlier",{"type":9,"value":348},"Improves pipeline visibility",{"type":9,"value":350},"Updates CRM automatically",{"type":9,"value":352},"Prevents opportunities from stalling",{"type":9,"value":354},"vfFEi96gx",{"f3SYvBJLQ":356,"gq3yWTCpl":358,"qQ9qGex2E":360,"gHxesv1i2":362,"KJ6_kkpoJ":364,"HmKwdN7Pu":366,"qF82LzZ76":369,"ziDVbQeO3":371,"kTzoPKY1_":373,"OVbryiK6t":375,"id":377},{"type":237,"value":357},"AreIRE3wH",{"type":9,"value":359},"Account Intelligence",{"type":237,"value":361},"kgaHhsdsD",{"type":9,"value":363},"account-intelligence",{"type":9,"value":365},"Account details, history, and key context, so your agent always understands the account and can recommend actions.",{"type":248,"value":367},{"collectionId":250,"pointer":368},"[1,[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Before every call, meeting, or outreach, Rox surfaces what matters: recent news, org chart changes, open deals, relationship history, and recommended next steps. It’s all in one place and always current.\"]]]",{"type":9,"value":370},"Centralizes account context",{"type":9,"value":372},"Surfaces key buying signals",{"type":9,"value":374},"Tracks account history automatically",{"type":9,"value":376},"Recommends better next actions",{"type":9,"value":378},"rrMEKM0dp",["Map"]]</script><div id="svg-templates" style="position: absolute; overflow: hidden; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 0; z-index: 0; contain: strict" aria-hidden="true">

  <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      ['__framer-badge-container', '__framer-editorbar'].forEach(id => {
        const el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) el.remove();
      });
    });
  </script>
